stemHtml: For an aerodrome in Controlled Airspace Class C, ATC provides separation…

options.a: at aerodromes for arriving traffic, but not for departing traffic.
options.b: between flights under IFR and between IFR and VFR flights, but does not provide separation between flights under VFR.
options.c: between all flights under IFR and VFR.
options.d: between flights under IFR, but does not provide separation between IFR and VFR flights, and flights under VFR.
